issues.issue: Description omits three of the five special themes (github, scale, monochrome) and omits URL TLD substitution and analytics event tracking, which are key behaviors visible in the source.
issues.suggestion: Button component wrapping @gravity-ui/uikit Button with support for special themes (app-store, google-play, github, scale, monochrome), icon/image attachments with left/right positioning, URL TLD substitution, and analytics event tracking.

issues.issue: Description lists the four themes correctly but omits that the 'normal' theme renders an optional arrow icon, and omits URL TLD substitution and analytics tracking.
issues.suggestion: Link component supporting four themes: 'back' (renders BackLink), 'file-link' and 'underline' (renders FileLink), 'normal' (renders an anchor with optional arrow icon). Supports URL TLD substitution and analytics tracking.

issues.issue: Description is vague and omits that GMapProps requires an 'address' prop while YMapProps requires 'markers' and 'id', which are the key structural differences between the two map types.
issues.suggestion: Map component that renders either YandexMap (requires 'markers' and 'id') or GoogleMap (requires 'address') based on the MapType from MapsContext.
